allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add workstation standards and configuration scripts

New scripts for Windows workstation configuration:
- BSOD diagnostics and analysis
- BitLocker configuration and enablement
- Windows features management
- SSD performance optimization
- Registry backup automation
- System restore configuration
- Windows debloat \(apps, OneDrive, services, telemetry\)
- Core isolation and MPO disable options
- Offline files disable
- Xbox services disable
- Recovery partition extension
- Winget app installation

Additional scripts:
- Dentrix QoS configuration
- MSP360 uninstall
- MySQL database utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
